description: Comprehensive MCP server for the Robokassa payment gateway (18 tools, full API coverage).

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.artgas1/robokassa-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Merchant login identifier for the Robokassa shop.
environmentVariables.name: ROBOKASSA_LOGIN

environmentVariables.description: Shop's Password #1 — used for checkout URL signing, SuccessURL signature verification, CalcOutSumm, fiscal receipts, and SMS.
environmentVariables.name: ROBOKASSA_PASSWORD1

environmentVariables.description: Shop's Password #2 — used for OpStateExt payment status checks and ResultURL signature verification.
environmentVariables.name: ROBOKASSA_PASSWORD2

environmentVariables.description: Shop's Password #3 — used for Refund API (JWT HS256). Refund API access must be enabled in the cabinet.
environmentVariables.name: ROBOKASSA_PASSWORD3
